title: Malformed enum declaration causes hang
body:
Against: "Verilator 4.031 devel rev v4.030-14-gc2b49f01" (a recent development build).

A malformed enum declaration (circular reference) should raise an error but instead causes a hang. Below:

typedef enum logic { A  = 'b0, B = 'b1 } foo; // GOOD
typedef enum foo { C  = 'b0, D = 'b1 } foo; // BAD
